mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_WORD_STUDY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_WORD_STUDY(ID, WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED, EDU_WORD_MAP_ID, USER_ID) VALUES(#{id}, #{wordStudyIsCompleted}, #{eduWordMapId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID = TEWM.ID WHERE TWS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TEWM.EDU_ID = #{eduId} AND TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1
